ideation: This animation sequence will show the robot reacting to the downward trend represented by the chart decreasing emoji.  The animation will start with the robot's arms relaxed at its sides, then move to a posture of slight concern as the chart goes down, and finally end in a posture that expresses disappointment or worry.  The movement will be focused on the robot's head position, as well as its arms, to express the emotional response. Frame 1: Arms at sides, neutral. Frame 2: Arms slightly raised and angled downward, wrists slightly turned in, head tilted downwards. Frame 3: Arms slightly lower than Frame 2, head slightly more tilted downwards, and body leaning forward. Frame 4: Arms drop back down to sides, head tilted downwards slightly, body slightly slumped.

frames.beat: arms hang at the sides, neutral stance
arms lift slightly, wrists turn in, head dips
arms lower, head tilts further, leaning into worry
arms drop, head down, a disappointed slump
